source_reviews.notes: The report supports the stated 29% strategy-in-place, 34% developing, 32% no-strategy, 68% task-expectation figures and the listed workflow use cases. Its ACEC-member engineering-and-design frame supports direction but not the packet's exact six-digit role fractions or effective-adoption conversion.

The page supports the 186-owner sample and the 62%, 51% and small-firm planning-gap statistics. It does not report an owner-age distribution, so it supports succession readiness but only a disclosed directional proxy for owners over 60.

FHWA directly states that FAR-compliant indirect-cost rates are established annually and used for estimating, negotiating and payment on federal-aid engineering contracts, supporting the stated pass-through mechanism.
The model rules directly support seal, signature, competence, responsible-charge, review-control and full-responsibility requirements used to bound automation and terminal demand.

The report supports the cited 4.5-6.0x small-firm, 7.0-9.5x platform, 502-deal, buyer-share and 3,000-plus target figures. Its broad A/E and advisor-analysis frame supports the estimates directionally but is not an exact 541330 buyer census or target-band sample.
The Census definition directly supports the six-digit boundary and the listed advice, feasibility, design, construction-phase technical service, inspection and evaluation activities.

publication_caveats: inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Some ACEC task-exposure statistics come from 47 ACEC-member firms in a broader AEC survey and are not representative of every 541330 operator.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: The supplied top-ten role mix leaves a 46.95% residual containing both highly exposed admin/proposal work and resistant specialty/field roles.
inputs.ai_replaceable_share: Architecture, stand-alone drafting, surveying, testing labs and environmental consulting are outside 541330 even when association sources discuss A/E or AEC together.
inputs.pi_dist: No cited source supplies a 541330 revenue-weighted split between lump-sum, cost-plus, specific-rate and other contract forms.
inputs.pi_dist: FAR mechanics apply to federal-aid work and are a broad proxy for cost-based public contracts, not all industry revenue.
inputs.pi_moat: The regulatory floor protects accountable delivery but does not prevent fee competition.
inputs.pi_moat: Moat varies by subsegment: utility and on-call infrastructure relationships are stronger than generic private development design.
inputs.t50_years: Strategy presence is a proxy for effective use and may overstate realized hours saved.
inputs.t50_years: ACEC members and larger firms may adopt earlier than lower-middle-market firms.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: AI strategy is not the same as effective adoption or labor substitution.
inputs.current_adoption_pct: Survey coverage is ACEC member engineering and design firms, not a probability sample of NAICS 541330.
inputs.historical_analogs: BIM and GenAI differ in reliability, liability and ease of deployment; this is a directional analogy only.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: The cited study measures planning, not owner ages; this input is a disclosed proxy.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct: The 186-firm sample spans under $2M to over $1B revenue and may not represent the target band.
inputs.owners_60plus_pct.succession_shortage_documented: A planning gap does not mean every firm must sell externally.
inputs.active_consolidators: The source reports A/E transaction volume, not a unique-buyer census.
inputs.active_consolidators: Architecture and environmental consulting deals may be included even when targets are outside 541330.
inputs.buy_mult: The target screen is $1-10M EBITDA, not the source's revenue bands.
inputs.buy_mult: Owner compensation, project WIP, backlog quality and concentration must be normalized before applying the multiple.
inputs.exit_mult: Platform attributes must be created and retained; an owner-dependent roll-up will not automatically receive 9.0x.
inputs.exit_mult: The source aggregates engineering-related subsegments and includes advisor analysis alongside transaction databases.
inputs.pricing_structure: No public source in the packet reports a representative 541330 revenue split by compensation method.
summary: Mechanics and exact-artifact binding pass. Reopened sources support the thesis direction, contract pass-through, professional-responsibility floor, transaction activity and selected valuation ranges; the substantial six-digit scope, adoption, owner-age, buyer-count and contract-mix limitations are already disclosed and remain publication caveats rather than score-changing defects.
